creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text: Port mail/claws-mail-pgp depends on a running gpg-agent. Due to Bug 214568, several daemons and tools from port security/gnupg are broken and so is port mail/claws-mail-pgp. With no running gpg-agent the GPG/MIME facility/plugin is rendered useless and no signing, encryption or decypher of emails via that plugin is possible.
